open_questions: Modality-specific source modules are still needed for single-cell multiome, immune repertoire, long-read sequencing, DIA/DDA proteomics, phosphoproteomics, and imaging-based spatial methods.
Source/provenance ledgers still need JSON Schema validation.
Severity classification needs explicit categories for rubric failure, scientific validity risk, reporting completeness risk, reproducibility risk, policy-compliance risk, and draft-stage TODO.
Dissertation-specific review still requires the real draft, marking scheme, figure assets, source constraints, and target assessment context.
next_actions: Add automated JSON Schema validation for source and provenance ledgers.
Expand verified open-access corpus coverage for modality-specific biomedical/genomics modules.
Add modality/study-design routing fields to templates or schemas.
Do not begin dissertation-specific specialization until explicitly requested with required materials.
